en.extract:
The  black-capped robin (Heteromyias armiti) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae native to New Guinea. The black-capped robin has been split from the ashy robin (Heteromyias albispecularis) .

The  '''black-capped robin''' ('''''Heteromyias armiti''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Petroicidae]] native to New Guinea. The black-capped robin has been split from the '''[[ashy robin]]''' (''Heteromyias albispecularis'') .<ref>{{Cite web|title=Species Updates – IOC World Bird List|url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/updates/species-updates/|access-date=2021-05-29|language=en-US}}</ref>
